response.justification: While the candidate brings 19 years of solid engineering experience and entrepreneurial credentials, they fundamentally lack the core qualifications for this director-level AI strategy role. AI experience began only 1 month ago at current employer (April 2025) working on MCP frameworks—insufficient to meet the requirement for 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' Similarly, the role demands cloud/AI platform strategy expertise; this candidate's background is generalist full-stack application development without evidence of cloud platform architecture work or strategic advisory experience.
strengths: Demonstrated 19 years of technical breadth across web, mobile, embedded systems and infrastructure with strong software craftsmanship practices
Proven entrepreneurial drive as founder of GISCollective (9 years) and experience at multiple early-stage companies
Teaching and mentorship track record through workshops, refactoring dojos, and mentoring at multiple organizations
concerns: AI expertise is brand new (1 month into first AI-focused role) with no prior ML background or demonstrated AI products—falls far short of 'recognized AI expertise'
No evidence of cloud platform architecture strategy or deep cloud infrastructure expertise required for platform strategy role
Career pattern shows strong engineering execution but lacks director-level strategic work, customer advisory, or product vision leadership needed for principal-level role

key_factors.factor: Years of engineering experience and breadth
